name: Workflow Run Audit
outcome_goal: Inspect recent workflow failures and identify unresolved gates or connections

jobs.label: inspect_history
jobs.prompt: Call praxis_status_snapshot for the last 48 hours to gather recent workflow run data.

jobs.label: summarize_failures
jobs.prompt: Based on the praxis_status_snapshot from 'inspect_history', summarize the failures. Specifically, identify which gates (e.g., verification, submission) or connections did not resolve based on the top failure codes and failure breakdown.
